impact: This gives the autonomous supervisor a deterministic recovery script for the exact repeated failure mode: stop broad retries after malformed comparison syntax, add compile/import guards first, and retry only a small no-dataclass implementation once syntax validation is proven.
summary: Tighten supervisor repair guidance for repeated Python/TypeScript syntax failures and correct the malformed Python example so the worker is steered toward one-file, syntax-first retries.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 6 recent validation rollbacks were syntax or compile failures; patch daemon prompt, preflight, or repair guidance before more worker attempts

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
